source: Curated from the NIST CMVP validated-modules program lists (https://csrc.nist.gov/projects/cryptographic-module-validation-program/validated-modules). This is an OFFLINE cross-reference SUBSET of commonly-encountered modules, not the complete CMVP database. Operators may extend it.
notes: On 2026-09-21 all remaining FIPS 140-2 modules move to the CMVP Historical list. Historical status means a module should not be included in NEW federal procurements; it is not revoked and may continue in legacy systems subject to a risk determination.

modules.name: OpenSSL FIPS Object Module 2.0
modules.note: Legacy OpenSSL 1.0.2 FIPS module; already on the CMVP Historical list.

modules.name: OpenSSL FIPS Provider 3.0
modules.note: OpenSSL 3.0 FIPS provider, validated under FIPS 140-2 — moves to the Historical list on 2026-09-21.

modules.name: BoringCrypto
modules.note: Google BoringCrypto; historically validated under FIPS 140-2.

modules.name: Bouncy Castle FIPS Java API
modules.note: Bouncy Castle FIPS distribution with FIPS 140-3 validation(s).
